title: Rename shadow_engine → mlb_recommendation_api across launcher, logs, dashboard
objective: Replace the legacy name shadow_engine with mlb_recommendation_api wherever it refers to the launcher process + its UI surface, to reflect what the process actually does (MLB model recommendation API).
required_work: 1. Grep for every occurrence of shadow_engine in allowed files.
3. Route new log writes to logs/mlb_recommendation_api.log.
4. Update dashboard process-health label + hover tooltip.
5. Leave historical log file and all BOT_BRIDGE handoffs untouched.
acceptance_criteria: Launcher starts the process under the new name
Dashboard shows the new name with explanatory tooltip
No functional behavior change — process starts and logs same content
verification: Start launcher, paste the LAUNCHER: line showing new name
ls logs/ showing both old and new log files
Screenshot or describe dashboard label change
git status or file-diff output confirming no BOT_BRIDGE changes
